items.title: How Much Longer Can We Avoid Thinking About The Long Term? - Weekly Blog #923

items.title: President Trump's QE Plans Could Boost Housing And The Stock Market
items.description: Trump is pursuing unconventional stimulus to lower rates and boost economic growth ahead of midterm elections. Read what it could do to the housing market.

items.title: Household Net Worth Q3 2025: The 'Real' Story
items.description: As of Q3 2025, the latest Fed balance sheet indicates that household net worth has risen a staggering 207% since reaching its 2009 low.

items.title: Rates Spark: Dutch Pensions Transition And A Fed Attack
items.description: The second-largest Dutch pension fund published new details about their hedging strategy challenging speculative positions for steeper curves. Expect more volatility from the very long end.
